snippet.title: Avatar Legends: The Fighting Game - Official Azula Reveal Trailer
snippet.description:
True power, the divine right to rule, is something she was born with. Meet Azula and see the character in action in this latest trailer for Avatar Legends: The Fighting Game, an upcoming 2D anime action fighting game based on the Avatar: The Last Airbender and The Legend of Korra series, developed by Gameplay Group International in collaboration with Paramount. 


Azula's unraveling psyche and duality turns into her greatest strength, from poise and precision to mellifluous madness. Unlike a certain exiled prince, she settles for nothing less than perfection.


Avatar Legends: The Fighting Game will be available on PlayStation 5 (PS5), Xbox Series X/S, and PC via Steam on July 2, 2026. It is also coming to Nintendo Switch and Nintendo Switch 2 at a later date.


Preorder on Steam: https://store.steampowered.com/app/2424420/Avatar_Legends_The_Fighting_Game/

Wishlist on PS5: 
https://store.playstation.com/en-us/concept/10018989/

https://www.xbox.com/en-us/games/store/avatar-legends-the-fighting-game/9ph2332vrwsf

snippet.title: REAL STRUGGLE (Official Music Video) | Dharampreet & Kuldeep Rasila | New Punjabi Song 2026
snippet.description:
LUCKY MANILA & KULDEEP RASILA PRESENTS

🎬 REAL STRUGGLE – Official Music Video


Life is not always easy. Behind every smile, every dream, and every success, there is a story of sacrifice, pain, hard work, and struggle. “REAL STRUGGLE” is a Punjabi track dedicated to those people who keep fighting their battles silently and never give up.
This song reflects the reality of life, emotions, and the journey that many people experience while chasing their dreams. If you have ever faced difficult times, this song is for you.


✨ Watch the full video and feel the emotion behind every word.

snippet.title: SUPERGIRL "Superman Gives Supergirl Her Suit" Trailer TV Spot 2 (4K ULTRA HD) 2026
snippet.description:
Trailer For Supergirl in 4K ULTRA HD Quality

Supergirl Plot : Kara Danvers who is Superman's biological cousin is forced to unveil her hidden powers and protect the inhabitants when an unexpected disaster strikes National City.


Cast :
- Milly Alcock as Kara Zor-El / Supergirl: The cousin of Clark Kent / Superman who was raised on a chunk of the destroyed planet Krypton and watched everyone around her die, making her a more jaded person than her cousin who was raised on Earth by loving parents. Because Kryptonians are healed and gain powers from yellow suns, Supergirl likes to party on planets with red suns where she can get drunk. Producer James Gunn envisioned Supergirl as a "pixie-ish, but very attitudinal character".
- Matthias Schoenaerts as Krem of the Yellow Hills
- Eve Ridley as Ruthye Marye Knoll: A young girl whom Supergirl meets on her journey
- David Krumholtz as Zor-El: Supergirl's father
- Emily Beecham as Alura In-Ze: Supergirl's mother
- Jason Momoa as Lobo: An alien mercenary and bounty hunter from the utopian planet Czarnia

Supergirl is scheduled to be released by Warner Bros. Pictures in the United States on June 26, 2026. It will be part of the DCU's Chapter One: Gods and Monsters.

All The Videos In The Channel Are Enhanced To 4K (3840 × 2160 px; also known as Ultra HD and UHD) Quality.

SUPERGIRL "Superman Gives Supergirl Her Suit" Trailer TV Spot 2 (4K ULTRA HD) 2026

snippet.title: NRG vs G2 - VCT Americas Stage 1 Playoffs - Lower Finals
snippet.description:
VCT Americas Stage 1 marks the next step in the race to Champions Shanghai, and the stakes could not be higher. Twelve teams, two groups, and only three spots on the line.

Group Alpha is fueled by one central clash. Brazil versus the Americas. LOUD, MIBR led by Aspas, and FURIA bring regional pride, while Leviatán and Cloud9 look to challenge them. G2 stands in the middle, ready to prove they still belong among the elite.Group Omega is shaped by pressure. NRG stand as the favorites, but KRÜ arrive ready to fight, and Envy reenters the spotlight with legendary names looking to prove they can still compete.

Only 3 teams will reach Masters London. Tune in to find out Americas representatives!

We’re proud to work with our fantastic partners throughout 2026: ExpressVPN, HP, Pulsar, Red Bull, Samsung, Secretlab, and Verizon.
